---
agent: Instructions Generator
---

Take the information below and generate [NAME].instructions.md file for it in the /.github/instructions directory. Generate an appropriate name for the [NAME] placeholder based on the generated content. If no information is provided below, prompt the user to give the necessary details about the layer of architecture or coding standards that this instructions file should cover.
The .md file should have frontmatter with a description property that informs copilot of when to use this set of instructions.
